texto: One-man regimes belong to old eras
autor: they involve clowning and arbitrariness! In the twenty-first century only the silly and larky nations give permission to such third-class contemptible regimes!
explicacao: Citação de they involve clowning and arbitrariness! In the twenty-first century only the silly and larky nations give permission to such third-class contemptible regimes! sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “One-man regimes belong to old eras” articula reflexao, mehmet-murat-ildan, regimes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
